query:
SELECT
                COUNT(*)                                                AS "count!: i64",
                COALESCE(SUM(from_amount), 0)                          AS "volume!: sqlx::types::BigDecimal",
                COALESCE(SUM(cngn_amount), 0)                          AS "cngn!: sqlx::types::BigDecimal",
                COUNT(DISTINCT wallet_address)                         AS "wallets!: i64"
            FROM transactions
            WHERE created_at >= $1 AND created_at < $2
